en: Ten years. I mean, days of our lives.
That's actually on television. So what are you going to do?
I guess I could sleep with her, I mean, but how can I do that?
ko: 방송 중이잖아. 그녀와 자는 것도 괜찮을 것 같아.

en: Well, I've got a pop-up book that told me everything I need to know.
I've never slept with someone for a part. Well, is she...
ko: 나는 역할을 위해 누군가와 자본 적이 없어.

en: I mean, if I met her in a bar or something, I'd be buying her breakfast, you know, after
ko: 내 말은, 만약 내가 바에서 그녀를 만난다면, 아침을 사줄 거야.

en: You know, maybe this isn't such a big deal, you know?
I mean, the way that I see it is you get a great job and you get to have sex, you know?
I mean, throw in a tree and a fat guy and you've got Christmas.
ko: 그러니까, 나무 하나랑 뚱뚱한 남자 하나만 있으면 크리스마스가 되는 거지.

en: I just... I just don't think that I want it that way, though, you know?
